60609.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
60609.description: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.

60610.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
60610.description: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

60611.title: Anderson Cooper 360
60611.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

60612.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
60612.description: Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty and crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on the nature of Sicilian hospitality.

60613.title: Don Lemon Tonight
60613.description: Don Lemon presents the biggest stories, newsmakers, and spirited conversations of the day.

60614.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
60614.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

60615.title: World Sport
60615.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

60616.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
60616.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

60620.title: Early Start
60620.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

60622.title: World Sport
60622.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

60623.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
60623.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

60624.title: Connect the World
60624.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.
